examples: He lay down upon a sumptuous divan, and proceeded to instruct himself with honest zeal.
I was admitted by a man servant, and shown into a sumptuous room where a couple of elderly gentlemen were sitting.
Sumptuous friezes and inscriptions cursing anyone tampering the grave decorate many sarcophagi found in the outgrowth.
The interior is sumptuous in gold and there are cushioned booths curtained off with silk.
